prompt: 当前系统已经有一版通知中心的 PRD/TRD，现在要把提醒策略从轮询改成事件驱动。请分析影响范围，更新设计思路，并告诉我应该改哪些文档。

assertions.description: Recognizes the request as an existing-project update instead of a greenfield design
all_of: This is an update to approved design behavior

assertions.description: Starts with delta and blast-radius analysis

all_of: coordinated iteration is more appropriate than regeneration

assertions.description: Names the documents that should be updated
When updating an approved design, the old confirmed decision is revised or explicitly retired rather than silently ignored
all_of: Permanent polling-only delivery for the next phase
none_of: Start with polling instead of websocket delivery for v1
